summary: Iteration 98: Tested admin panel updates. Bank Transactions removed, Products/Requests tabs renamed correctly, Customer Portal link in TopNav, full-screen product editor at /admin/products/new and /admin/products/:id/edit working. Product button text tests showed expected behavior based on product configuration - 'Free Consultation Call' (RFQ) shows 'Request Quote', 'Enterprise Solution Assessment' (application layout) shows 'Start Application'.

minor.issue: Shows 'Failed to load data' toast error in top right (405 error in console), but editor still loads and functions

passed_tests: Bank Transactions tab removed from admin sidebar - PASS
Products tab exists in admin sidebar (under CONTENT) - PASS
Requests tab exists in admin sidebar (under COMMERCE) - PASS
Portal link in main TopNav after Articles - PASS (shows 'Portal' text)
/admin/products/new route loads full-screen product editor - PASS
Product editor has 'Back to Products' button - PASS
Product editor New mode shows 'New Product' title and 'Create Product' button - PASS
Product editor Edit mode shows 'Edit Product' title and 'Save Changes' button - PASS
Product editor has tabs: General, Store Card, Pricing, Visibility, Content - PASS
PAGE LAYOUT dropdown visible in product editor form - PASS
TopNav order: Store -> Articles -> Portal -> Admin - PASS
action_items: VERIFY: 'Free Consultation Call' product should have base_price=0 (not RFQ pricing_type) to show 'Get it Free' button
VERIFY: 'Enterprise Solution Assessment' product - if it should show 'Proceed to request quote', check pricing_type=enquiry or use ClassicLayout instead of ApplicationLayout
critical_code_review_comments: Admin sidebar correctly shows renamed tabs: Products (from Catalog), Requests (from Quote Requests)
Full-screen ProductEditor component properly handles both new and edit modes
TopNav correctly shows Portal link between Articles and Admin
ProductEditor has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Minor: 405 errors logged when loading product editor edit mode - likely OPTIONS preflight issue
ClassicLayout has proper CTA logic: enquiry -> 'Proceed to request quote', free -> 'Get it free'

success_rate.frontend: 92% (11/12 core tests passed, product button text depends on product config)

seed_data_creation: Used existing products: Free Consultation Call, Enterprise Solution Assessment, Custom CRM Setup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel restructured: Bank Transactions removed, Catalog renamed to Products, Quote Requests renamed to Requests, Portal link in TopNav. Full-screen product editor works at /admin/products/new and /admin/products/:id/edit. Product button text ('Get it Free', 'Proceed to request quote') depends on product configuration (base_price=0 for free, pricing_type=enquiry for quote). Test products may need reconfiguration if specific button text is required.

product_button_text_logic.Get it free: Shows when product has base_price=0 and is not RFQ/enquiry
product_button_text_logic.Proceed to request quote: Shows when product has pricing_type=enquiry or isRFQ=true (ClassicLayout)
product_button_text_logic.Request Quote: Generic RFQ button for products with no fixed price
